section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
We will obtain this data directly from you or – if a recruitment agency is
involved – directly from the agency.
embed_text:
We process: basic personal information,
career-conditions (e.g. notice period), education and work experience,
professional knowledge, attached documents / attachments, if applicable, special
categories of data (e.g. if you have a disability or special needs), information
about your interview and notes on it, and additional information shared with us
during the application process. We will obtain this data directly from you or – if a recruitment agency is
involved – directly from the agency. Conclusion of an employment contract: Reviewing and processing your application.

How will my application data be managed?

All applications are entered into our applicant management system. If you
applied by post, we will digitize your documents and return the originals to
you. To process your application, a candidate profile will be created in the system.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
To increase the protection and security of your data, we use a tool that
automatically detects personal data.
embed_text:
General

The chatbot collects and uses any and all information that you provide it with. To increase the protection and security of your data, we use a tool that
automatically detects personal data. (Hereafter, we will refer to this tool as
the "PII tool"; "PII" is short for personally identifiable information.)

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
If you
(accidentally) enter personal data in the chatbot, the tool will automatically
recognize it and respond by asking you to enter your request/question again, but
this time without personal data.
embed_text:
(Hereafter, we will refer to this tool as
the "PII tool"; "PII" is short for personally identifiable information.) If you
(accidentally) enter personal data in the chatbot, the tool will automatically
recognize it and respond by asking you to enter your request/question again, but
this time without personal data. The following cookies are used:

Session-Cookie: Contains a session ID and information about the referring page
Google-Cookies: Google reCAPTCHA is used.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text: We process your data to provide and secure the chatbot service.
embed_text:
These include: date and time of access, status message, and the
accessed URL. We process your data to provide and secure the chatbot service. Due to the use of the PII tool, your data may be transferred to a server of our
AI chatbot provider Kapa.ai Inc. (Sacramento, CA 95834, USA) and processed
there.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
The transfer is based on legal safeguards for international data
transfers.
embed_text:
Due to the use of the PII tool, your data may be transferred to a server of our
AI chatbot provider Kapa.ai Inc. (Sacramento, CA 95834, USA) and processed
there. The transfer is based on legal safeguards for international data
transfers. Kapa.ai uses the enterprise version of ChatGPT (OpenAI OpCo LLC, San Francisco,
CA 94110, USA), which does not store personal data.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
How long will my data be saved?

PII content is deleted immediately.

PII content is deleted immediately. If you voluntarily provide feedback after a support interaction, we process your
ticket number and the content you enter in the free text field.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
After you delete your forum account, your username and email address will be
deleted immediately.
embed_text:
The forum serves as a communication platform for our community members. After you delete your forum account, your username and email address will be
deleted immediately. However, posts you have made in the forum will be retained
in anonymized form.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text: We need this data to carry out the prize draw, and to notify the winners.
embed_text:
This data is
provided directly by you, e.g. via a form on our website or by interacting with
our social media posts. We need this data to carry out the prize draw, and to notify the winners. After the prize draw has ended and the prizes have been sent, we delete the
related personal data.

text:

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text: We process your data to create and manage your customer account.
embed_text:
If you are invited to a cloud project, we store only your email address. We process your data to create and manage your customer account. This is
necessary to give you access to our products and services.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
If we register a domain for you, we pass on the necessary data to the respective
registry (depending on the domain).
embed_text:
To make future payments easier, a pseudocard number is saved in your customer
account. If we register a domain for you, we pass on the necessary data to the respective
registry (depending on the domain). If you fail to pay despite repeated reminders, we may instruct the debt
collection company Intrum to collect the outstanding debt.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
How long will my data be saved?

After a customer account is deactivated, the following retention periods apply:

Without product usage: 3 years
With product usage (invoicing): 14 years (in accordance with tax and commercial
law retention obligations)
Unverified customer accounts: 14 days after the end of the failed verification
period

Once these periods have expired, your data will be archived in our long-term
backup systems.
embed_text:
If you fail to pay despite repeated reminders, we may instruct the debt
collection company Intrum to collect the outstanding debt. How long will my data be saved?

After a customer account is deactivated, the following retention periods apply:

Without product usage: 3 years
With product usage (invoicing): 14 years (in accordance with tax and commercial
law retention obligations)
Unverified customer accounts: 14 days after the end of the failed verification
period

Once these periods have expired, your data will be archived in our long-term
backup systems. We are not obligated to actively delete data from backup systems.

- as part of our public communications (Art. 6 para.

4.11.1 Verification of customer details

To minimize our business risk and to prevent the misuse of our services, we
carry out a check based on general risk factors when new customer accounts are
registered.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text: You may black out or hide other information on the document that is not needed.
embed_text:
The following data may be processed: name,
address, date of birth, expiry date of the document. You may black out or hide other information on the document that is not needed. We process this data to prevent fraud, protect our services, and ensure they are
not misused.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
If verification via such
a provider is required, we will forward your name and the country you live in.
embed_text:
In some cases, the identity verification is not carried out by Hetzner directly,
but by the certified external service provider iDenfy. If verification via such
a provider is required, we will forward your name and the country you live in. This transfer only takes place after you click the verification link.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
In all other cases, the data will be deleted immediately after the verification
is completed.
embed_text:
If verification is carried out by iDenfy, your data will be stored for two
months. In all other cases, the data will be deleted immediately after the verification
is completed. We are not required to inform you if your identity verification
data has been affected by a security incident, as iDenfy bears sole
responsibility for such notifications.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?
text:
The GDPR grants you the following rights regarding your data:

Right of access:
You can request information about your personal data by filing a formal request
through our online customer portal at accounts.hetzner.com using your verified
account login.
embed_text:
The GDPR grants you the following rights regarding your data:

Right of access:
You can request information about your personal data by filing a formal request
through our online customer portal at accounts.hetzner.com using your verified
account login. Right to rectification:
If the account information we have stored about you is incorrect or incomplete,
you can request its correction or completion.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?
text:
Right to rectification:
If the account information we have stored about you is incorrect or incomplete,
you can request its correction or completion.
embed_text:
The GDPR grants you the following rights regarding your data:

Right of access:
You can request information about your personal data by filing a formal request
through our online customer portal at accounts.hetzner.com using your verified
account login. Right to rectification:
If the account information we have stored about you is incorrect or incomplete,
you can request its correction or completion. Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):
You cannot request the deletion of your data solely on the grounds that it is no
longer required for its original purpose.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?
text:
However, please note that immediate deletion may not be
possible in some cases due to legal or contractual retention obligations.
embed_text:
Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):
You cannot request the deletion of your data solely on the grounds that it is no
longer required for its original purpose. However, please note that immediate deletion may not be
possible in some cases due to legal or contractual retention obligations. If, for example, you dispute the accuracy of your data or believe that the
processing is unlawful, you must submit a written request by post to our data
protection officer to restrict the processing of your data.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?
text:
If, for example, you dispute the accuracy of your data or believe that the
processing is unlawful, you must submit a written request by post to our data
protection officer to restrict the processing of your data.

section: 6. Making complaints to the relevant data protection authority
text:
Making complaints to the relevant data protection authority

If you believe that we are not handling your data correctly, we encourage you
to contact our data protection officer directly.

If you would like to make use of any of these rights, please contact our

any possible disagreements as quickly and smoothly as possible.
